name: preecode-frontend
description: Preecode web dashboard frontend with enhanced UI/UX

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R assets auth js layout pages api.js app.js index.html login.html register.html about.html privacy.html terms.html legal.html forgot-password.html styles.css tailwind-config.js theme.js mobile-enhancements.js mobile-detection.js mobile-dashboard-fix.css force-mobile-styles.js mobile-test.js premium-hero.js premium-hero.css premium-hero.html hero-premium.html dist/
